raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2024 I purchased a 4 night stay at the XXXX XXXX for {$650.00} from XXXX ( fully prepaid ). 

On XX/XX/2024 after completing my trip, I noticed XXXX new charges on my Citi Costco XXXX which were unapproved and unauthorized for {$470.00}, {$410.00}, and {$63.00}. This stay was prepaid and I incurred no charges on my stay. I disputed all XXXX charges with Citi. The first for {$470.00} was approved and credited while the XXXX XXXX were rejected due to " not enough information provided. '' Citi will not respond when asking what further information is needed. XXXX claims my stay was " wiped clean '' and " does not exist. '' They refuse to send me receipts of my stay and costs incurred there. I challenge Citi as clearly they did not investigate. I have been charged by XXXX and XXXX double for the same stay and only the XXXX charge is legitimate. I can not get ahold of anyone at Citi to provide detailed information on why this unapproved unauthorized charge was rejected
